path.description: Path identifies the field, section, or artifact path associated with the error.

message.description: Message is the human-readable explanation of the problem.

ErrorDetail.description: ErrorDetail describes one machine-readable validation or execution problem in a command result.

slot.description: Slot is the stable reviewer slot identifier.

dimension.description: Dimension is the human-readable review dimension label.

severity.description: Severity is the finding severity label.

title.description: Title is the short human-readable title of the finding.

details.description: Details is the full review finding explanation.

locations.description: Locations optionally lists lightweight repo-relative source anchors for the finding, such as "path/to/file.go", "path/to/file.go#L123", or "path/to/file.go#L1-L3".

ReviewAggregateFinding.description: ReviewAggregateFinding is one aggregate finding annotated with its slot and dimension context.

label.description: Label is the stable display label for the artifact.

path.description: Path is the artifact path when one exists.

status.description: Status reports whether the artifact is available, missing, or invalid.

summary.description: Summary is the concise artifact-state explanation.

content_type.description: ContentType reports how Content should be rendered in the UI resource.

content.description: Content is the resolved artifact file payload for UI tabs when readable.

ReviewArtifactView.description: ReviewArtifactView is one raw supporting artifact view for a review round.

plan_path.description: PlanPath is the current plan path associated with the review data.

local_state_path.description: LocalStatePath is the plan-local control-plane state path when one exists.

reviews_dir.description: ReviewsDir is the current-plan review rounds directory.

active_round_id.description: ActiveRoundID is the currently active review round when one exists in local state.

ReviewArtifacts.description: ReviewArtifacts points to the current plan review sources.

severity.description: Severity is the finding severity label.

title.description: Title is the short human-readable title of the finding.

details.description: Details is the full review finding explanation.

locations.description: Locations optionally lists lightweight repo-relative source anchors for the finding, such as "path/to/file.go", "path/to/file.go#L123", or "path/to/file.go#L1-L3".

ReviewFinding.description: ReviewFinding is one review finding in a submission or aggregate.

ok.description: OK reports whether review loading succeeded.

resource.description: Resource is the stable UI resource identifier.

summary.description: Summary is the concise human-readable explanation of the loaded review rounds.

artifacts.description: Artifacts points to the current-plan review artifact paths used to build this response.

oneOf.description: Rounds lists the discovered review rounds for the current plan.

rounds.description: Rounds lists the discovered review rounds for the current plan.

warnings.description: Warnings lists non-fatal degraded-state notes for the overall review resource.

errors.description: Errors lists hard failures that prevented review loading.

ReviewResult.description: ReviewResult is the read-only UI resource returned by `/api/review`.

round_id.description: RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round.

kind.description: Kind is the review kind for the round.

anchor_sha.description: AnchorSHA is the delta-review anchor commit when one is available.

step.description: Step is the tracked plan step number when the round is step-scoped.

revision.description: Revision is the plan-local revision associated with the round.

review_title.description: ReviewTitle is the human-readable title for the round when one exists.

status.description: Status is the stable UI status label for the round.

status_summary.description: StatusSummary is the concise explanation of the current round status.

decision.description: Decision is the aggregate decision when one is known.

created_at.description: CreatedAt is the round creation timestamp when known.

updated_at.description: UpdatedAt is the ledger update timestamp when known.

aggregated_at.description: AggregatedAt is the aggregate timestamp when known.

is_active.description: IsActive reports whether local state still points at this round as active.

total_slots.description: TotalSlots is the number of reviewer slots represented by the round.

submitted_slots.description: SubmittedSlots is the number of reviewer slots with a submission.

pending_slots.description: PendingSlots is the number of reviewer slots still waiting on a submission.

reviewers.description: Reviewers lists the reviewer-centric slot views for the round.

blocking_findings.description: BlockingFindings lists aggregate blocking findings when they exist.

non_blocking_findings.description: NonBlockingFindings lists aggregate non-blocking findings when they exist.

artifacts.description: Artifacts lists supporting raw review artifacts for the round.

warnings.description: Warnings lists non-fatal degraded-state notes for the round.

ReviewRoundView.description: ReviewRoundView is one read-only UI representation of a review round.

name.description: Name is the human-readable dimension label.

slot.description: Slot is the stable reviewer slot identifier.

instructions.description: Instructions is the reviewer prompt for this slot when the manifest is readable.

status.description: Status is the current submission status label for the slot.

submission_path.description: SubmissionPath is the path to the submission artifact for this slot.

submitted_at.description: SubmittedAt is the submission timestamp when one is known.

summary.description: Summary is the reviewer's concise overall assessment when one was submitted.

findings.description: Findings lists the slot-level review findings when one was submitted.

worklog.description: Worklog contains normalized progressive reviewer-worklog fields derived from the submission payload when available.

raw_submission.description: RawSubmission preserves the raw reviewer submission payload for secondary UI inspection.

warnings.description: Warnings lists non-fatal degraded-state notes for this slot.

ReviewSlotView.description: ReviewSlotView is one reviewer-centric view of a manifest slot plus any submission that was returned for that slot.

review_kind.description: ReviewKind is the reviewer-reported kind from the coverage payload when available.

anchor_sha.description: AnchorSHA is the reviewer-reported anchor SHA from the coverage payload when available.

full_plan_read.description: FullPlanRead reports whether the reviewer marked the full active plan as read.

checked_areas.description: CheckedAreas lists the files, checkpoints, or areas the reviewer says it already covered.

open_questions.description: OpenQuestions lists unresolved review trails still in flight.

candidate_findings.description: CandidateFindings lists provisional findings captured during review before they were finalized into the canonical findings payload.

ReviewWorklogView.description: ReviewWorklogView contains normalized reviewer-progress fields derived from the richer submission payload.

title: Review UI resource
description: Read-only JSON resource returned by `/api/review` for `harness ui`.
